After playing with it a bit, Meta's Muse Spark Thinking is fine so far, but really doesn't match the current Big Three models. It also is a bit... weird. Like some strange language & tone, a little loose with facts, etc.

And here is how it does on the neo-gothic shader test. https://t.co/aDlcslfdSu
Meh on the Lem Test as well https://t.co/OqRtgAVJUl https://t.co/EAjppHpWGg
Sparks unicorn https://t.co/vACCxhMzMv https://t.co/ox4Epp6zPY

Anyhow, its not bad. Just not the vibe level that the benchmarks might indicate. And, for a first re-entry into the frontier model space, given the engineering efficiencies they achieved, it feels like a solid attempt. I am sure we will see better from Meta in the future.

Meta's latest model Muse Spark is actually much better than I had expected. 

Is it benchmark maxxed? Yes 100%. But so is every other model. 

Is it the frontier leader in any single category? No. 

Is it better than I expected? Yes. 

It feels between Sonnet 4 and Opus 4 level

兄弟们这个好

一个"项目起手包"

你想做一个网站或者 App，要搭数据库，配登录注册，搞部署环境... 光前面这些准备工作就要折腾好久，而且很麻烦费时间

InsForge Templates 这个项目把这些准备工作全打包好了。你跑一条命令，它直接给你一个配好的项目，数据库、登录、部署全都接好了...

现已在 Claude 平台上线公开测试版。

Anthropic 发布云端托管 Agent 基础设施 Claude Managed Agents

帮你把安全沙箱、会话状态、权限管理、凭证和追踪等底层工程都打包好

只需要定义任务、工具和规则，就能让 Agent 长时间自主运行、调用工具、恢复错误，还有多 Agent 协同和自我评估迭代

把从原型到生产的周期从几个月压缩到几天 https://t.co/61NLMpcLxq

小扎挖的团队终于交了第一份答卷，发布 Muse Spark 模型

支持原生多模态推理模型，支持工具使用、视觉思维链和多智能体编排。

还有“沉思（Contemplating）”模式，可以协调多个并行Agent 进行推理。

在 Artificial Analysis 上得分比 Gemini 3.1 Pro、GPT-5.4 和 Claude Opus 4.6 低一些。

只能在 https://t.co/bG4fwJL74y

谷歌的迭代真的很慢，终于在 Gemini 应用里面支持按项目整理聊天和文件

类似 Claude 的 Project 功能，他们叫笔记本

你可以把自己跟Gemini 的聊天和文件都放到对应的笔记本里

也可以直接在 NotebookLM 中打开这个笔记本进行交流。 https://t.co/OIgsxtmb3t

So what's the deal with Amazon Nova? They released Nova 2 in December, and even then, the top flight Nova 2 model trailed Sonnet 4.5. And it still hasn't left preview.

So we now have a pretty good picture of the state of the frontier AI model makers.

US closed source models continue to lead. Google, OpenAI, and Anthropic stand well ahead of the pack, and may have signs of recursive self-improvement. xAI has fallen from frontier status for now

Lots of open questions: is RSI indeed happening at the Big Three labs? How long can the exponential of LLM ability gain last? How much do Chinese models rely on distillation, and can they keep pace given chip constraints? Will there continue to be frontier open weights models?

The US frontier labs have all walked away from open weights. They continue to occasionally release excellent open models (Gemma 4, etc), but they are smaller models that are not competitive with their closed weights models. So all eyes are on Chinese AI labs for open models.

Anthropic 推出 Claude Managed Agents 

可以托管你的 Agent
从原型到上线只要几天

做过 Agent 的人都知道，写 Agent 逻辑本身不难，难的是把它稳定跑在生产环境里。

你要处理：容器编排、沙箱隔离、凭证管理、状态持久化、断点续跑、错误恢复、可观测性。

这套东西搭下来，几个月就过去了，Agent https://t.co/D631OZLe63

一句话就是：

你定义 Agent 要干什么，Anthropic 帮你把运行环境、状态管理、安全隔离、错误恢复全包了，跑在他们的云上。

详细内容：https://t.co/YSoT8zl7Lf https://t.co/CqDRciDpXe

Meta 发布 Muse Spark 多模态推理模型

推翻 Llama 重来 但是不开源

Meta 发布了 Muse Spark，这是 Meta Superintelligence Labs 的第一个模型，也是 Meta 在 AI 模型上的一次彻底换轨。

不是 Llama 的下一代，是一个全新系列...

三个核心能力：

① https://t.co/jAnUv2QP81

跑分怎么样

Artificial Analysis 综合排名第四（52），在 Gemini 3.1 Pro、GPT-5.4、Claude Opus 4.6 之后。
多模态和健康领域领先，编码和 Agent 能力是明显短板 https://t.co/8NSU3M4u16

闭源：Meta 最大的争议点

Llama 系列一直是开源 AI 的标杆，整个开源 AI 生态有很大一部分建立在 Llama 上。Muse Spark 选择闭源，这是一个重大转向。

Meta 的说法是"希望未来的版本能开源"

目前 Meta ai 和 Meta AI App 可用，免费。

API 仅限邀请制。

详细内容：https://t.co/5cwfra94OJ
